name: syn-default
description: Synthesis: read SSOT+filelist → write run.ys → yosys → sanity gate → area + report

tasks.detail:
Verify all input files exist:
- [ ] <ip>/yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml — extract `top_module` (or fall back to <ip>) + `clocks[]` for the report header.
- [ ] <ip>/list/<ip>.f — every path inside it must resolve on disk.
Gate: SSOT readable, filelist non-empty, every file in filelist exists.

Check that $SKY130_LIB is set and the file is readable.
Default: <repo>/pdk/sky130/lib/sky130_fd_sc_hd__ss_100C_1v40.lib.
If missing or unreadable: STOP, emit `[SYN MISSING PDK]`, do NOT fall back to generic synth — STA will reject ungated netlist.
Gate: $SKY130_LIB resolves and `head -1 $SKY130_LIB` succeeds.

Run scripts/write_yosys_script.sh <ip>.
Resulting run.ys must contain: read_liberty, read_verilog -sv (one per filelist entry), hierarchy -top, synth -top, dfflibmap, abc -liberty, opt_clean, write_verilog, stat -liberty.
Gate: <ip>/syn/run.ys exists.

Run scripts/run_yosys.sh <ip>.
If rc != 0: read syn.log tail, identify error class (Latch inferred / Module not found / unmapped cells), fix in RTL, re-run.
Gate: yosys rc=0, synth.v non-empty.

tasks.content: [SYN] Sanity gate — no unmapped, no unintended latches
tasks.detail:
Run scripts/check_unmapped.sh <ip>.
- [ ] 0 lines matching `^\s*\$_` in synth.v
- [ ] 0 lines matching generic yosys cell prefixes
- [ ] 0 latch cells UNLESS SSOT has `latch_intended: true`
If the gate fails: do NOT proceed. Report which check failed and which cells / lines triggered it. Re-synthesize after RTL fix.
Gate: check_unmapped.sh exits 0.

Run scripts/parse_area.sh <ip>.
area.json schema: {top, corner, total_cells, total_area_um2, by_kind.{sequential,combinational}.cells, by_cell{}}.
Gate: area.json exists, total_cells > 0, sequential.cells > 0 (unless SSOT clocks[] is empty).

Run scripts/write_report.sh <ip>.
Report contents: top, corner, netlist path, total cells, total area μm², seq vs comb counts, top-5 cells by frequency, first 20 yosys warnings.
Gate: syn.report.md written.

Print one summary line so the next workflow knows the handoff is good:
`[SYN HANDOFF] <ip>/syn/out/synth.v ready (cells=N, FFs=M, area=X μm²) — run /sta`.
Gate: handoff line emitted.
